name: subagents: prompt_migration_status field is one of {original, migrated-zero-delta, migrated-with-delta:<reason>} per §2.3 enum
command: for a in review-node-boundaries review-node-observability; do val=$(grep -E "^prompt_migration_status:" "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/agents/$a.md" | awk '{print $2}'); echo "$val" | grep -qE "^(original|migrated-zero-delta|migrated-with-delta)" || { echo "FAIL $a has bad migration_status: $val" 1>&2; exit 1; }; done; echo ok 1>&2
